input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.8.3
            TITLE: all material and structure of the head restraint must be inside one or both of:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.8.3: All material and structure of the Head Restraint must be inside one or both of:
T.2.8.3 All material and structure of the Head Restraint must be inside one or both of:  
a. Rollover Protection Envelope  F.1.13  
b. Head Restraint Protection (if used)  F.5.10

final_answer: T.2.8.3: All material and structure of the Head Restraint must be inside one or both of: a. Rollover Protection Envelope F.1.13 b. Head Restraint Protection (if used) F.5.10
